precedence_order: scope-specific canonical planning, semantic, runtime, schema, contract, release, and policy artifacts
docs/agents/AGENT_MIRROR_POLICY.md and other scope-specific canonical mirror-governance artifacts

terms.required_meaning: constitutional host for lawful deterministic runtime execution
bounded coordinated runtime-facing mediation or hosting structure

forbidden_collapses: collapse kernel, component, and service into one generic runtime term
use stale pre-Φ vocabulary that hides current runtime distinctions

ownership_caution_requirements.summary: fields/ is canonical semantic field substrate; field/ remains transitional.
schema/ is canonical semantic contract law; schemas/ remains a projection or advisory mirror.
packs/ and data/packs/ have scoped ownership and are not interchangeable.
generated roots under build/, artifacts/, .xstack_cache/, and run_meta/ remain evidence only.
thin runtime/ naming does not imply canonical architectural authority.

mirror_families.target_ecosystem: GitHub Copilot and GitHub repository instruction entry surfaces
mirror_families.maintenance_rule: Update when AGENTS.md, ownership review, or early-Φ runtime vocabulary changes materially.
mirror_families.conflict_rule: Canonical sources win; stale mirror must be updated or removed.

mirror_families.maintenance_rule: Create only when stable path-local instruction differences are justified by real repo divergence.
mirror_families.conflict_rule: Any future path-specific file must remain subordinate to root mirrors and canonical governance.
mirror_families.omission_reason: Deferred in Σ-1 to avoid path-local shadow canon before Σ-2 and later mirror/tooling refinements.

mirror_families.maintenance_rule: Update when canonical governance, ownership cautions, or runtime vocabulary changes materially.
mirror_families.conflict_rule: Canonical sources win; stale mirror must be updated or removed.

mirror_families.maintenance_rule: Create only when a bounded profile need is justified and later Σ safety/task prompts provide sufficient guardrails.
mirror_families.conflict_rule: Any future profile must remain derived, bounded, and non-privileged.
mirror_families.omission_reason: Deferred in Σ-1 to avoid hidden privileged agent classes before Σ-2 task mapping and Σ-5 safety hardening.

allowed: links back to canonical governance and scoped canonical doctrine
forbidden: new semantic, runtime, or release policy invented for one ecosystem only

stale_mirror_handling.notes: Stale mirrors are maintenance bugs and must not be followed over canonical artifacts.
